title: quercus agbayi
intro: Quercus agbayi, also known as the Philippine white oak, is a species of evergreen tree native to the Philippines. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Quercus agbayi include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Quercus agbayi often include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to fully understand its effectiveness.
